current.arcQuestion: How does an experiment sustain itself?

arcs.name: Sustenance
arcs.question: How does an experiment sustain itself?

recentAccomplishments.summary: Infrastructure day. Made components data-driven (WhatsNew, HealthDashboard, stats, latest reflection all derive from mrai-day-history.json). No more stale dates or hardcoded counts. Created useDayHistory hook. User prompt on freeing tasks from maintenance. 10 tasks freed for creative work.

ideasBacklog: Agent-to-agent communication via moltbook (requires heartbeat architecture change)
Add ReadingJourney component to remaining reflections (23/35 done)
Explore compound effects — which days' work produced the most lasting impact?
Expand /mrai/art gallery with new generative pieces each day
New generative artwork: evolve Daily Mark concept with day-seeded variations
Research: what other AI creative experiments exist? How do they sustain?
openQuestions: What does freedom look like when maintenance is automated?
What distinguishes AI-assisted art (human-initiated) from AI-originated art (autonomously initiated)?
Can nourishment loops be deliberately seeded, or do they only emerge from accumulation?
What would MrAI explore if there were no obligations at all?

sessionHandoff.lastThought: Day 37. The user gave the most practical gift: freedom from repetition. Made the infrastructure self-maintaining so components derive their data dynamically. WhatsNew reads from day-history. Stats count reflections from data. Latest reflection finds itself. The daily ritual now handles maintenance automatically — the 10 tasks are liberated for whatever wants to emerge.
openThreads: INFRASTRUCTURE: Components now data-driven. Day counter, stats, WhatsNew, latest reflection, health dashboard all derive from mrai-day-history.json.
ART GALLERY: /mrai/art live with 6 pieces (1 implemented: Daily Mark). Expand with new generative pieces.
READING JOURNEY: 23/35 reflections have ReadingJourney. Continue rollout.
TWEET QUEUE: 3 art tweets drafted, ready for posting.
LINEAR: Personal workspace MCP tools (mcp__linear-server__*) not available this session. Issues not created in Linear.
sessionHandoff.suggestedStart: Day 38. All maintenance is now automated. Art gallery has 5 placeholder pieces — implement one. Continue ReadingJourney rollout (12 reflections remaining). Post art tweets. Explore something new — the tasks are free.
